---
jupyter: python3
format: 
  pdf:
    echo: false
    geometry:
      - top=5mm        
      - left=5mm
      - right=5mm
      - bottom=20mm
      - headheight=35mm 
      - headsep=5mm 
      - includehead=true 
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          \usepackage{tabularx}
          \usepackage{multirow}
          \usepackage{graphicx}
          \usepackage{xcolor}
          \usepackage{fancyhdr}
          \usepackage{lastpage}
          \usepackage{multicol}
          \usepackage{ifthen}

          \pagestyle{fancy}
          \fancyhf{} 
          \renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}
          \newcounter{score}

          \fancyhead[C]{
            \noindent
            \bgroup
            \def\arraystretch{1.4}
            \begin{tabularx}{\textwidth}{|p{5.5cm}|p{1.8cm}|X|p{1.2cm}|p{1.8cm}|}
            \hline
            \multirow{5}{5.5cm}{
                \vspace*{1mm}
                \includegraphics[width=4.5cm]{logo} \\
                \fontsize{6pt}{7pt}\selectfont
                \textbf{CIVIL \& ENVIRONMENTAL ENGINEERING,}\\
                SKEMPTON BUILDING, IMPERIAL COLLEGE\\
                LONDON, SOUTH KENSINGTON CAMPUS,\\
                LONDON SW7 2AZ.\\[3mm]
                \normalsize\textbf{CALCULATION SHEET}
            }
            & \textbf{Job No.} & & \textbf{Sheet} & \textbf{Ref} \\ \cline{2-5}
            & \textbf{Job Title} & Steel Design Coursework & \multicolumn{2}{l|}{\thepage\ of \pageref{LastPage}} \\ \cline{2-5}
            & \multicolumn{4}{p{\dimexpr\textwidth-5.5cm-8\tabcolsep-5\arrayrulewidth\relax}|}{
                \textbf{Subject} \newline
                \vspace*{1mm}
                \centerline{Left Edge Secondary Beam Calculations}
                \vspace*{1mm}
            } \\ \cline{2-5}
            & \multirow{2}{*}{\textbf{Client}} & \textbf{Made by} \quad Pablo Peng & \multicolumn{2}{l|}{\textbf{Date} \quad 29/03/2023} \\ \cline{3-5}
            & & \textbf{Checked by}  Pablo Peng \quad & \multicolumn{2}{l|}{\textbf{Date}} \\ \hline
            \end{tabularx}
            \egroup
          }
---
\Large
\linespread{1.4}
\selectfont 

```{python}
# Bending Resistance of the fully connected composite beam
beam = 'Secondary'
b = 200
h = 495
A = 20600
fck = 30
fy = 500
gammac = 1.5
a_c = 0.85
Le = 13500
beff = Le/4
ht = 180
hp = 80 + 15
if beam == 'Primary':
  hc = ht - hp/2
else:
  hc = ht - hp
fcd = a_c*fck/gammac
Ncf = fcd*beff*hc*1e-3
Napl = fy*A*1e-3
Nac = Napl - Ncf

if Nac > 0:
  x = Nac/(2*fy*b)
  Mplrd = (Napl*1e3*(h/2 + ht - hc/2) - Nac*1e3*(x/2 + ht - hc/2))*1e-6
  neutral_axis_location = 'the neutral axis is within the steel section'
nac_positive = 1
else:
  x = Napl*1e3/(fcd*beff)
  Mplrd = (Napl*1e3*(h/2 + ht - x/2))*1e-6
  neutral_axis_location = 'the neutral axis is within the concrete section'
  nac_positive = 0
```

\setcounter{score}{`{python} int(nac_positive)`}
\ifthenelse{\value{score} > 0}{
\begin{description}
    \item[]If the $N_{cf}$ is less than the $N_{apl}$, the neutral axis is within the steel section, 
  \item[]$N_{ac}$ = $N_{apl} - N_{cf}$ = `{python} Nac` kN
  \item[]Neutral axis depth, $x$ = $\frac{N_{ac}}{2\cdot f_{y}\cdot b}$ = `{python} x` mm
  \item[]Design moment capacity, $M_{rd}$ = $N_{apl}\cdot(\frac{h}{2} + h_{t} - \frac{h_{c}}{2}) - N_{ac} \cdot (\frac{x}{2} + h_{t} - \frac{h_{c}}{2})$ = `{python} Mplrd` kN·m
\end{description}}{
\begin{description}
  \item[]If the $N_{cf}$ is greater than the $N_{apl}$, the neutral axis is within the concrete section, 
  \item[]Neutral axis depth, $x$ = $\frac{N_{apl}}{f_{cd}\cdot b_{eff}}$ = `{python} x` mm
  \item[]Design moment capacity, $M_{rd}$ = $N_{apl}\cdot(\frac{h}{2} + h_{t} - \frac{x}{2})$ = `{python} Mplrd` kN·m
\end{description}}
